info.name: Get important voting information for a state or territory.

params.name: state
params.description: U.S. state, district, or territory name (PascalCase, e.g. Alabama, NewYork, PuertoRico, DistrictOfColumbia).

items.docs: Returns the FAQ-style important voting information XML feed for the specified jurisdiction.

info.name: Get deadline dates for a state or territory.

params.name: state
params.description: U.S. state, district, or territory name (PascalCase, e.g. Alabama, NewYork, PuertoRico, DistrictOfColumbia).

items.docs: Returns the election deadlines XML feed for the specified jurisdiction.

info.name: Get ballot rules for a state or territory.

params.name: state
params.description: U.S. state, district, or territory name (PascalCase, e.g. Alabama, NewYork, PuertoRico, DistrictOfColumbia).

items.docs: Returns the FPCA, FWAB, and VBR ballot rules XML feed for the specified jurisdiction.

info.name: Get election offices for a state or territory.

params.name: state
params.description: U.S. state, district, or territory name (PascalCase, e.g. Alabama, NewYork, PuertoRico, DistrictOfColumbia).

items.docs: Returns the local election office contact information XML feed for the specified jurisdiction.

info.name: Get the combined eVAG feed for a state or territory.

params.name: state
params.description: U.S. state, district, or territory name (PascalCase, e.g. Alabama, NewYork, PuertoRico, DistrictOfColumbia).

items.docs: Returns the combined electronic Voting Assistance Guide (eVAG) XML feed bundling important info, deadline dates, ballot rules, and election offices for the specified jurisdiction.

info.name: Get the XML schema definition for the FVAP feeds.

items.docs: Returns the XSD describing the structure of all FVAP XML feeds.
